title: Thai Pad Thai
description: A classic Thai dish made with stir-fried rice noodles, vegetables, and your choice of protein. This recipe is a quick and easy take on a traditional favorite.

ingredients.name: vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: or peanut oil for added flavor

ingredients.name: golden
ingredients.notes: thinly sliced and toasted peanuts for garnish

instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and stir-fry until the onion is translucent.
Add the carrots and bean sprouts and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the Thai red curry paste and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the cooked noodles, sugar, soy sauce, and lime juice to the skillet.
Transfer the Pad Thai to a serving platter and garnish with toasted peanuts and lime wedges.
